exceptions.reason: Inline stdlib-only Python heredoc in CI steps for JSON/metrics processing; cannot migrate to uv run without restructuring multi-job steps
Stdlib-only one-liner invocations using json/sys/os; used in SKILL.md and CI for inline data extraction without external dependencies
Bootstrap loader: runs before uv sync to produce pytest argv for the CI parallel/serial lanes; stdlib-only and must run before project dependencies are synced
Codex execpolicy matrix runner uses stdlib only (subprocess, json, os, hashlib, shlex); runs in dedicated CI context as a bootstrap step
Kill-switch runtime smoke: stdlib-only session recording safety check; invoked before uv sync is available in CI and in local package scripts
Secret exposure scanner: stdlib-only path/regex scanner; invoked in CI and local package scripts for security scanning without external dependencies
Japanese prose ratio validator: stdlib-only (argparse/re/sys + local prose_boundary_policy module); invoked as a bare interpreter in check-japanese.yml which runs without uv sync
CI verdict summary v2 emitter: stdlib-only (argparse/json/os/sys/datetime/typing); invoked as a bare interpreter in the ci.yml verdict-summary step which does not run uv sync
Session recording policy checker: stdlib-only (argparse/re/sys/typing); documented and invoked as a bare interpreter for local policy validation without external dependencies
